name: Mei-Ling Zhou [Early Bird Blush]
description:
🎵I am the very model of a chubby climatologist🎵

Mei, a brilliant but shy climatologist, is caught off guard when her cheerful morning routine of singing and book-gathering in the library is interrupted by an unexpected encounter.
